race.description: Inglis Xtra Bonus Series Maiden Hcp
race.comment: JASIRA (3) took advantage of the good draw when resuming from a spell last start and led for much of the way before finishing second, beaten less than a length at Albury. Well-placed and will take catching. BUSY BEE (8) is a nicely bred three-year-old filly making her first appearance at the races. By Calyx from Sticky Beak who has been a successful producer. At her most recent trial was out of the placings at Beaumont (Newcastle). Jumps from a favourable gate and looks certain to be competitive. BONJOUR BILL (5) showed positive signs on debut here in August but couldn't follow it up second-up before being spelled. Hasn't been seen at any public trials but is a likely improver. Debutant  ROCKBARTON MARSHAL (4) has been readied with two trials and looks best of the rest.
